title: 1998 South Korean local elections
summary: The 2nd Local Elections were held in South Korea on 4 June 1998. A total of seven metropolitan city mayors, nine provincial governors, 680 provincial-level councilors, 232 municipal-level mayors and 3,490 municipal-level councilors were elected.
text:
The 2nd Local Elections were held in South Korea on 4 June 1998. A total of seven metropolitan city mayors, nine provincial governors, 680 provincial-level councilors, 232 municipal-level mayors and 3,490 municipal-level councilors were elected.

Metropolitan city mayoral elections
Seoul
Busan
Daegu
Incheon
Gwangju
Daejeon
Ulsan
Gubernatorial elections
Gyeonggi
Gangwon
North Chungcheong
South Chungcheong
North Jeolla
South Jeolla
North Gyeongsang
South Gyeongsang
Jeju
Provincial-level council elections
Summary
Constituency seats
Proportional representation seats
Municipal-level mayoral elections
Summary
By region
Municipal-level council elections
3,490 seats in municipal-level councils were contested by candidates running as independents.
